title: Assistant Finance Manager [up to $7,500 + AWS | Central]
description:
Responsibilities :

  • Prepare monthly journals and reconciliation schedules for standalone financial statements.
  • Perform monthly end Account closing and prepare financial reports and analysis for standalone financial statements.
  • Prepare quarterly consolidated financial statements.
  • Prepare quarterly budgets (annual and mid-term plan) carefully and within stipulated deadlines.
  • Prepare and submit GST and WHT reports.
  • Liaison with tax consultant on corporate income tax and review their working.
  • Handle other tax compliance and filling such as Pillar 2, transfer pricing documentation, and CFC tax regime compliance.
  • Liaise with external and internal auditor for audit.
  • Prepare Audited statutory financial statement.
  • Handle operating system issues.
  • Handle internal control, process improvement and user manual related tasks.
  • Back-up for Accounts payables/Accounts receivable tasks.
  • Handle other ad-hoc duties that may arise on an ad-hoc basis.
  • Report to the FIN/ACC Supervisor.

Requirements

  • Minimum 5-7 years of relevant accounting experiences in financial accounting and reporting.
  • Professional qualification such as CPA, CA, ACCA, or equivalent would be an added advantage
  • Good knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting.
  • Experience in month-end/year end close process able to meet tight deadline.
  • Prior working experience dealing with Audit process is preferred.
  • Proficient in MS Office applications.
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills and strong interpersonal skills.
  • Regional exposure will be advantageous
  • Prior working experience with SAP B1 would be an added advantage.

To Apply, please kindly email your updated resume to cv_rhys@goodjobcreations.com.sg

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. However, rest assured that all applications will be updated to our resume bank for future opportunities.

Please kindly refer to the Privacy Policy of Good Job Creations for your reference:

https://goodjobcreations.com.sg/en/privacy-policy/
